title: Phase 35.4 — URL Inspection Forensics
methodology: GSC URL Inspection API (googleapiclient) + curl live verification

forensicsSummary.indexabilityVerified: ALL 7 URLs are technically indexable — HTTP 200, correct canonicals, robots index,follow, substantial content (46-73KB), in sitemap
forensicsSummary.rootCause: Google has NEVER crawled any of these 7 URLs. The 'Request Indexing' rejections are because Google won't accept indexing requests for pages that haven't been crawled. Pages need to go through 'Test Live URL' → force crawl → then 'Request Indexing.'
